mapper.select:
SELECT fitCardId,
FROM fit_card WHERE fitCardId=#{fitCardId}
mapper.delete:
delete from fit_card where fitCardId in
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE fit_card SET cardType=#{cardType}, cardName=#{cardName}, cardPrice=#{cardPrice}, newUserPrice=#{newUserPrice}, validity=#{validity}, cardImgUrl= #{cardImgUrl}, autoPay= #{autoPay}, status= #{status}, nextPrice= #{nextPrice}, nextPriceTitle= #{nextPriceTitle}, nextPrice2= #{nextPrice2}, nextPriceTitle2= #{nextPriceTitle2}, nextPrice3= #{nextPrice3}, nextPriceTitle3= #{nextPriceTitle3}, costPrice= #{costPrice}, cardRule=#{cardRule}, useCount=#{useCount}, storeAddrIds=#{storeAddrIds}, showStoreAddrIds=#{showStoreAddrIds} WHERE fitCardId=#{fitCardId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) from card_order where cardId=#{cardId}
